sections.description:
Visual WAF rule builder, DNS manager, zone analytics, IP access rules, cache purge, zone controls, and security event viewer — all powered by the Cloudflare API, directly from your WordPress admin.

Features:
  • WAF Rules Builder — deploy 5 battle-tested security rules to any zone in one click
  • DNS Manager — full DNS record management with all 21 Cloudflare record types
  • Zone Analytics — requests, bandwidth, cache rate, pageviews, and threats per zone
  • Zone Controls — Under Attack mode, Dev Mode, cache purge, SSL, security level, and more
  • IP Access Rules — account-wide allowlist and blocklist by IP, range, country, or ASN
  • Security Events — view recent firewall events per zone (Pro plan zones)
  • Multi-account support — manage multiple Cloudflare accounts from one dashboard
sections.frequently asked questions:
Does this work on Cloudflare Free plans?

Yes for all features except Security Events, which requires a Cloudflare Pro plan or higher.

What API Token permissions do I need?

Zone → WAF → Edit, Zone → Zone → Read, Zone → DNS → Edit, and Account → Firewall Services → Edit (for IP Access Rules).

Can I manage multiple client sites?

Yes. Use the multi-account feature to connect multiple Cloudflare accounts and switch between them from the dashboard.

Where can I get the free version?

The full plugin is free and open-source on GitHub. The Pro version adds automatic updates in WordPress admin and priority support.
